description.value:
Heretek

Hereteks are those who have turned away from the strictures of the Adeptus Mechanicus to pursue forbidden knowledge, often involving xenos technology, artificial intelligence, or other blasphemous sciences. While hunted by the Inquisition and the Cult Mechanicus alike, their expertise in the forbidden makes them invaluable assets to certain Inquisitors who believe the end justifies the means.

Background Aptitudes

Finesse or Tech

Starting Skills

Deceive or Inquiry, Forbidden Lore (pick one), Medicae or Security, Tech-Use, Trade (pick one)

Starting Talent

Weapon Training (Solid Projectile)

Background Bonus

Master of Hidden Lores: When a Heretek makes a Tech-Use test to comprehend, use, repair, or modify an unfamiliar device, they gain a +20 bonus if they have one or more relevant Forbidden Lore skill specializations at Rank 1 (Known) or higher.

specialAbilities.name: Master of Hidden Lores
specialAbilities.description: When a Heretek makes a Tech-Use test to comprehend, use, repair, or modify an unfamiliar device, they gain a +20 bonus if they have one or more relevant Forbidden Lore skill specializations at Rank 1 (Known) or higher.
